Bash(python3 -c "
maxm = 2 << 52  # 9007199254740992
import collections
digits = collections.Counter\(\)
for line in open\('/Users/federico/code/simple_fastfloat_benchmark/data/canada.txt'\):
    s = line.strip\(\)
    if not s: continue
    t = s.lstrip\('+-'\)
    parts = t.split\('.'\)
    if len\(parts\)==2:
        m = int\(parts[0]+parts[1]\)
        d = len\(parts[0]+parts[1]\)
    else:
        m = int\(parts[0]\)
        d = len\(parts[0]\)
    digits[d] += 1
    
for k in sorted\(digits.keys\(\)\):
    print\(f'  {k} digits: {digits[k]}'\)
")
